about.title: About
about.intro: Hi! I'm João Pedro, a Computer Science student at UNIFESP. Focused on software engineering, fullstack development, artificial intelligence, and open-source projects, I seek to apply technical rigor and solid architectural patterns to solve practical problems.
about.current_experience_text: I currently work as a fullstack developer intern at G3P, developing web applications using ASP.NET Core, and actively contribute to open-source projects, especially wiRedPanda.
about.outside_code_text: When I'm not coding, I study music, read about philosophy, theology or literature, and try to learn a language (currently German). I also enjoy spending time with my dog, practicing obedience exercises, an activity that teaches me a lot about patience, I might add.
about.lets_talk_text: I am open to professional opportunities in fullstack/backend development or data engineering (Junior roles), as well as open-source collaborations. If you would like to discuss a role or have a chat about technology, feel free to schedule a call!

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Here I showcase projects I'm involved in or write at university, as well as some things I build in my free time.

chat.welcome: Hi! I'm Zippy, a cybernetic assistant and João's number one fan. You can ask me about his experience, projects, or how to contact him!
